items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for time-off and PTO tracking.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the time-off and PTO tracking feature, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for time-off and PTO tracking, there are no concrete examples or evidence demonstrating its implementation or testing. Therefore, the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied or unsatisfied based on the current evidence.
